EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Failed to establish credentials of the user {object.account.name} when the user was escalating privileges on host {event_src.host}
Credentials of the user {object.account.name} are established when the user was escalating privileges on host {event_src.host}
Credentials of the user {subject.account.name} are established when the user was logging in to the system on host {event_src.host}
Failed to establish credentials of the user {subject.account.name} when the user was logging in to the system on host {event_src.host}
